overview: CyraSense AI is a premium, intelligent women's health decision system that feels like a real digital health assistant. It tracks menstrual cycles, validates health inputs, analyzes patterns from personal history, and guides users with calm, responsible health insights.
features: Smart onboarding with input validation (age, height, weight cross-checks)
Personalized dashboard with cycle phase insights and daily wellness messages
Smart calendar with period days, ovulation window, and fertile window visualization
Daily logging for pain level, mood, and symptoms
Is This Normal? analyzer with 3-tier decision guidance
Personal baseline engine comparing cycles over time
Phase-based self-care content (menstrual, ovulation, luteal phases)
Women's health chatbot that stays on-topic
Monthly cycle summary with pattern insights
Settings with profile, city, and preferences management
